Conceded-real costs of keeping: unbounded (even fuel-bounded) CTFE makes compile time a hazard inside the AI iteration loop (D001/D004/D009 negative scopes flag specialization compile-time costs, quantified nowhere per caveats.md); a second evaluation semantics the writer must model creates a new error class (defender's honest concession); expansion-backtrace diagnostics point into code that exists in no file, whereas literal-source diagnostics point at text the writer actually wrote — the prosecution's repair-loop asymmetry claim is plausible but untested. The verdict routes the writer-cost burden to mandatory toolchain requirements (deterministic external generators as source-of-record, provenance records, diagnostic aggregation to pattern-level repair sites) rather than into the trusted compiler.
whatMustBeTrue: The language MUST include a closed, decidable, trivially-terminating constant-expression sublanguage (built-in arithmetic/layout/target-parameter constants only; NO user-defined function evaluation at compile time, hence no fuel, no hygiene, no cross-stage name resolution) so that array sizes, layout constants (A001-adjacent), and numeric-mode constants remain statable. 'Zero staging' is hereby defined as: no user-visible compile-time EXECUTION semantics and no code-producing stages — not 'no constant folding'.

Optimizer facts about constant data MUST be compiler-derived by inspection of literals (ranges, alignment, sizes) or compiler-checked against stated contracts before emission into UB-bearing channels (F003 noalias, N002 nsw/nuw, N004 range, N005 inbounds). Writer-asserted facts about constants are forbidden — this closes the defense's hallucinated-table miscompile channel and satisfies the ir-strategy round's disqualification of uncheckable trusted contracts.

Consistency-checking of repeated code MUST exist as a toolchain requirement: intended-identical or pattern-instantiated code regions carry machine-readable provenance (generator identity, canonical inputs, content hash); the build re-runs deterministic external generators and diffs their output against the source of record, failing the build on divergence. This is the drift detector the defense correctly showed cannot exist in-language under zero staging — it is relocated outside the trusted compiler, not waived.

The generics boundary is drawn crisply: parametric, type-checked-before-instantiation generics with in-compiler instantiation remain the sanctioned single-definition mechanism under the dispatch-generics candidate (D001/D002/D003), and this cut MUST NOT be read as mandating AI-side monomorphization or foreclosing the explicitly-open D005 bounded-sharing / F009 fourth-model axis — that decision belongs to the dispatch-generics topic and its ordered measurement program.

Target parameterization (vector widths, cache-line sizes, cfg variants) MUST be expressible through the constant sublanguage's target-parameter constants or through per-target provenance-checked generation, so A007-style hardware baking does not multiply unverifiable source variants.

If the arrays-loops prototype adopts a schedule layer (A006), it MUST be declarative structure interpreted by the compiler, with schedule SEARCH and autotuning living in the AI/tooling loop and landing as concrete checked structure; no in-language schedule generation. This reconciles the zero-staging ruling with round1-arrays-loops.md's leading candidate.

Diagnostics MUST be machine-readable and point at literal source; provenance records must let tooling aggregate N copy-local diagnostics for a shared defect into one pattern-level repair site, answering the diagnostics-multiplication cost.

Any future derive/annotation-processor or 'just one small macro' proposal MUST be adjudicated as external tooling against this verdict, not admitted as a core feature; violation semantics for provenance-check failures slot into the build system, not the graduated-obligations framework (which remains research_needed).
result.rationale: The null hypothesis survives, but the naked alternative does not — hence replace_with_alternative. (1) The keep is undischargeable today: the corpus contains zero macro/comptime/staging/CTFE evidence (verified by full-text search across all notes, debates, synthesis, and implementation files; the missing-research backlog does not list it), and caveats.md's standing rule requires exact card citation. The defense honestly conceded its case is 'a design candidate argument, not a carded conclusion' and surrendered syntactic/token/AST macros outright, so keep_essential is unavailable. (2) The defense's most powerful material — preserving parametric definitions so the specialize-vs-share axis stays a compiler decision (D001/D005, F009 fourth model, all verified against round1-dispatch-generics.md) — is genuinely strong but belongs to the dispatch-generics feature, which already keeps typed in-compiler instantiation as its leading candidate. Judged within its own remit, metaprogramming's unique load reduces to comptime value computation, derive-style generation, and cross-copy consistency. (3) For that residue, the corpus's only confirmed directional evidence favors restriction over evaluation: F006's true-by-construction-via-restriction pattern, F009's facts-below-source lesson, and the ir-strategy round's disqualification of uncheckable trusted contracts all argue against embedding a Turing-complete evaluator that must bit-match the N001/N002 numeric contract inside a compiler whose charter is verifiable simplicity. (4) But the prosecution's own concessions establish that a bare cut is incoherent: constant expressions must exist anyway, and the defense proved two rate-independent verification gaps (undetectable cross-copy drift; writer-asserted constant facts feeding UB channels). These are closable only if the alternative is promoted from option to obligation — deterministic external generation with build-enforced provenance diffing, and compiler-derived (never writer-asserted) constant facts. The verdict therefore cuts user-visible staging from the core and binds the language and toolchain to the eight requirements listed. All AI-writer behavioral claims on both sides remain EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED; they set the follow-up program and the reopening conditions, not the ruling, because the structural case does not hinge on them.
followUps: Run the drift experiment: have an AI edit one of N near-duplicate expanded regions across realistic edit cycles, with and without provenance/diff tooling; measure divergence rate and, critically, the fraction of divergence that escapes type/contract checking. Reopening condition: if provenance tooling cannot hold escaped-drift near zero, revisit this verdict's cut of in-language single-definition mechanisms.

Measure token/context economics at repository scale: generation plus re-read cost of fully-expanded vs parametric source, and whether longer contexts measurably raise AI defect rates in this regime (no cards exist; charter-admissible cost).

Measure compile time end-to-end: N pre-expanded source copies vs one definition plus N in-compiler instantiations, folded into the dispatch-generics measurement program already ordered (mono vs shared-body vs dictionary-passing; runtime, code size, i-cache, compile time).

Run the repair-loop asymmetry experiment: AI fix success rate and latency on literal-source diagnostics vs expansion-backtrace diagnostics into generated code — the prosecution asserted the former wins; untested.
Validate determinism and stability of the external-generator pipeline across edit cycles (the alternative's load-bearing tooling assumption), including provenance-record ergonomics for the AI writer.

Conduct a workload census of comptime-value demands (lookup tables, layout constants, target parameters, FFI shims per the runtime-abi dossier) to confirm the closed constant sublanguage plus external generation covers the demand. Reopening condition: if the census shows sustained pressure to grow user-defined compile-time evaluation, re-adjudicate a fuel-bounded pure fragment on that evidence.

Track the dispatch-generics follow-ups that couple to this verdict: the F003 shared-body noalias discharge check and the Swift generics-ABI dossier (F009 fourth model). Reopening condition: if that topic resolves toward IR-level parametric bodies with richer staged surface, the generics/staging boundary drawn here must be restated, though the macro/comptime cut itself is unaffected.

State the zero-staging constraint explicitly in the arrays-loops prototype brief: schedule structure in-language and declarative; schedule search in the AI/tooling loop; verify emitted schedule facts survive lowering and are consumed by passes (the end-to-end fact-consumption gap that round already flagged for every position).

result.optimizerRole: Split by sub-feature. (1) Implicit value-changing conversions are optimizer-NEGATIVE and are ruled out of core regardless of any future experiment: N001/N002 establish that numeric semantics are per-operation optimizer contracts (wrapping vs nuw/nsw-poison), so a compiler-inserted conversion silently swaps which contract governs with no source token, and D010 shows conversions perturb which method is selected and specialized (D001). This is incompatible with the numeric-semantics round's leading candidate (named, truthfully-lowered modes) — an implicit conversion is unnamed by construction. Both parties effectively agree here; the defender conceded all value-changing conversions. (2) Type inference per se contributes nothing the optimizer consumes: optimizer facts are boundary/intent annotations (ownership modes per F001/C004, numeric modes per N002, effects, shapes/layouts per A001) plus compiler analysis (N004-style derived facts can exceed writer precision). Inference only determines which CHANNEL — writer text or checker derivation — produces interior type facts. The corpus's own dispatch-generics candidate keeps one implicit path (guaranteed static specialization), establishing the governing principle: compiler-implicit is acceptable when the choice is guaranteed and semantics-invariant, unacceptable when it selects semantics. Local synthesis of a uniquely-determined interior type is the former; implicit conversion is the latter. (3) The alternative's per-binding LAYOUT/MODE mandate is itself optimizer-negative and rejected: F007/J004 show allocation/representation decisions are analysis-conditional; F002's payoffs (register promotion, load/store elimination) require the optimizer to own interior representation; F009/A002/A006 evidence the winning architecture of keeping representation and schedule decisions late and separable. No card evidences a per-binding layout mandate, and the null hypothesis applies to mandates too.
result.verificationRole: This is where the verdict genuinely hinges, and the corpus cannot resolve it. Prosecutor COUNT 2 (mandatory interior annotations are checked redundancy — two derivations that must agree, converting hallucination into a localized type error) is the strongest keep-the-alternative argument; the defender's rebuttal (same-pass annotations are error-correlated with the code they annotate, so the redundancy has near-zero independence and its diagnostic 'annotation is ground truth' heuristic is unsound) is mechanistically plausible via autoregressive conditioning. Both are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED; the corpus itself flags the gap (round1-aliasing-model.md: no cards on annotation error rates or inference feasibility for internal functions). What CAN be ruled: (a) F001/F003's warning — unchecked writer promises are a miscompilation channel — means any annotation the optimizer assumes must be checked, so annotations are either checked-redundant or unsound-assumed; there is no free third state. (b) D009's silent-degradation exhibit convicts only inference with a dynamic fallback: in a static core where local synthesis is deterministic and ambiguity is a hard error, inference failure is a compile error, not silent dynamic dispatch — the defender's boundary-annotation regime disarms D009's negative scope (heuristic failure under abstract types). (c) Whole-program inference across unannotated boundaries is cut on verification grounds: non-local blame, J001/J002 show reconstruction channels carry guard/deopt machinery, and the defender concedes it. (d) Explicit conversions make every representation change a stated, checkable fact — verification-positive. (e) Trust architecture: C004's auto traits show compiler-DERIVED facts (checker-trusted) versus its negative scope showing manual assertions are the UB channel; under a least-trusted-writer charter, moving derived-fact production into the checker is a verification improvement, provided derived facts are exported in a trusted, machine-readable elaborated form.
result.aiWriterConsiderations: All admissible writer-cost claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence cards; every statement below is flagged as such. Prosecutor's admissible costs of full annotation: generation/context token inflation (the defender's O(k^2) instantiated-type arithmetic for D001-style pipelines is structurally sound; its practical weight depends on unmeasured code-shape frequency), edit cascades scaling with program size not change size, more compile-error iterations, and unnameable types (closures, monomorphized instantiations) requiring new naming machinery — though Ada-style explicit nominal instantiation shows this is a cost, not an impossibility, and aligns with the dispatch-generics explicit-instantiation candidate. Defender's admissible costs of elision: re-reading AIs must re-derive interior types (a hallucination source) unless the toolchain emits compiler-elaborated fully-annotated views — this mitigation is a hard tooling requirement, and any workflow reading raw source without the elaborator loses it. Drift cuts both ways and is untested in both directions: inference-side, near-duplicate fragments can silently diverge in inferred types from a one-token difference (annotation converts this to an error at the drift site); annotation-side, wrong-but-well-typed annotations at elaboration-driving sites (let x: u8 = 255) are silent semantic decisions, and full annotation maximizes the count of such sites — though explicit literal typing is required under either regime, making this partially a wash. Machine-readable structured diagnostics are a hard requirement under EITHER regime: full annotation multiplies diagnostic volume; local inference must report ambiguity errors with elaboration provenance. Costs credited to cutting inference: no constraint-solver compile time in the iteration loop, no need for the writer to simulate coercion-resolution order to predict what its own code means.
whatMustBeTrue: DECIDED FLOOR (holds regardless of experiment outcome): zero implicit value-changing conversions in core — every representation or numeric-mode change is an explicit, named, mode-carrying operation (N001/N002/D010); even checker-proven zero-runtime-effect subsumption stays out under the null hypothesis unless re-proposed with evidence, and if admitted must emit a machine-readable elaboration record, never be silent.

DECIDED FLOOR: all intent-bearing facts are mandatory and explicit at every function signature, module interface, and generic instantiation — numeric mode, ownership/aliasing capability, effect row, and ABI-visible/public layout at type and interface declarations (F001/F003/C004/N002/F009; round1 aliasing-model, dispatch-generics, numeric-semantics, concurrency leading candidates). No cross-boundary inference of any of these, ever.

DECIDED FLOOR: the alternative's per-binding layout/mode mandate is rejected — interior representation is optimizer-owned (F002/F007/J004/F009/A002/A006); a schedule/layout layer, if added, is separable (A006), not fused into every binding.

If interior type elision is kept (defender's sliver): local synthesis must be deterministic, non-backtracking, defaulting-free (literal types explicit), with ambiguity a hard compile error — this is what disarms D009; any dynamic or heuristic fallback re-opens silent performance loss and voids this ruling.

If interior type elision is kept: the compiler MUST emit a canonical, machine-readable fully-elaborated form (every type/mode/effect explicit) as the re-read artifact for AI writers AND as the substrate for a consistency checker that diffs elaborations of near-duplicate fragments — this is the required consistency-checking mechanism for repeated code; without it the prosecutor's inference-side drift scenario stands unmitigated.

If interior annotations are instead mandated (prosecutor's regime minus layout): the language must provide nominal naming machinery for currently-unnameable types (explicit instantiation declarations, named closure types), and the redundancy-independence experiment must have shown same-pass annotations actually catch writer errors at rates justifying the measured token/cascade costs.

The IR verifier (ir-strategy candidate) must reject facts not originating from stated-and-checked or checker-derived sources, closing the back door of inference/coercion leaking in via macros, codegen templates, or convenience front-ends (prosecutor's toolchain-consistency point, unrebutted).

Round1 mode vocabularies (ownership, capabilities, numeric modes, effects) must stabilize before mass code generation in either regime; annotation-vocabulary churn is a systemic rewrite risk that scales with annotation density.

Card caveat: D/A/C/J citations (D001/D009/D010/C004/A001-A006/J001-J004) are direct-extraction and not adversarially verified per caveats.md and round1-index; the sub-rulings leaning on them (especially the D009 disarming and the layout rejection's J004 leg) must be re-checked when those cards are verified.
result.rationale: The feature as bundled is largely dispatched, but its live core is undecidable on this corpus, so the honest verdict is needs_evidence with a decided floor. What is decided: (1) Implicit conversions are cut — the prosecutor's COUNT 3 is fully card-backed (N001/N002: conversions silently reassign per-operation optimizer contracts; D010/D001: they perturb dispatch and specialization) and the defender conceded everything but a zero-runtime-effect subsumption sliver, which the null hypothesis also excludes absent evidence. (2) Whole-program/cross-boundary inference is cut — D009's silent degradation, J001/J002's reconstruction machinery, non-local blame, and the defender's own concession; every signature, interface, instantiation, mode, and effect is mandatorily explicit, consistent with all four round1 leading candidates. (3) The named alternative is REJECTED in its literal form: 'layout and mode at every binding' is contradicted by the corpus's strongest architecture cards (F007/J004: representation is analysis-conditional; F002: pinning forfeits the exact documented payoffs; F009/A002/A006: keep representation decisions late and separable), and 'every binding and call' founders on D001-unnameable types without new machinery neither side priced. The prosecutor's own filed 'boundary-drawing risk' concedes the decisive blur: its permitted 'bottom-up checking from annotated leaves' and the defender's 'local inference inside annotated boundaries' differ only in whether a let-binding restates a type the checker already uniquely determines. That residual question — is same-pass interior annotation independent checked redundancy that catches AI error (prosecutor COUNT 2), or correlated noise costing O(k^2) tokens and edit cascades (defender horn b) — is precisely an AI-writer empirical question, flagged EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED by both parties, sitting in a gap the corpus itself documents (round1-aliasing missing-cards note; the numeric round's 'uncarded fourth channel' of compiler-inferred facts, which also caps how much the prosecutor's 'stated facts are load-bearing' premise can claim). Ruling it either way today would violate the standing rule that proposals cite evidence and state what remains unproven. Leading candidate carried forward pending experiments: boundary-mandatory, intent-explicit core — zero implicit conversions, all intent facts explicit at boundaries, no per-binding layout, interior types produced by deterministic ambiguity-rejecting local synthesis with mandatory compiler-emitted elaboration records serving re-reads and near-duplicate consistency diffing. The experiments below decide whether interior annotation becomes mandatory (flipping to the prosecutor's regime minus layout) or elision stands.
followUps: Redundancy-independence experiment (decides the verdict): matched AI codegen tasks under two regimes — mandatory interior type annotations vs elided interiors with boundary annotations; measure (a) rate at which interior annotations catch real semantic errors the elided regime would compile wrong, (b) rate of correlated wrongness (annotation+code both wrong, typechecks), (c) trivial-mismatch friction errors and iterations-to-green. Directly tests prosecutor COUNT 2 vs defender horn (b).

Token/context economics: total tokens generated plus context consumed for read-modify-write tasks under full annotation vs boundary annotation plus compiler-elaborated views, including deep generic pipeline shapes (tests the O(k^2) claim's practical weight) and re-read error rates with raw source vs elaborated views (tests the defender's mitigation dependency).

Consistency-drift experiment: near-duplicate AI-generated fragments differing by one token (e.g., a literal); measure silent type/representation divergence rates under inferred vs annotated regimes and what fraction each regime's checker catches vs coherent wrongness that typechecks (tests the prosecutor's core drift claim in both directions).

Edit-cascade measurement: propagate one boundary type/effect/mode change; measure edit volume, induced hallucination rate per regenerated site, and loop iterations under both regimes (tests regeneration-cost-scales-with-program-size).

Compile-time delta in the AI iteration loop: syntax-directed checking of fully annotated programs vs deterministic local synthesis at scale, for a type system carrying ownership, effects, and modes (direction is argued structural, magnitude unmeasured; D004 covers only codegen-unit/LTO).

Execute the already-filed numeric backlog item (missing-research-backlog.jsonl, numeric follow-up): measure how much nsw/range-grade optimization LLVM recovers with no frontend flags from types and dominating guards — the 'uncarded fourth channel' that reprices the 'stated facts are load-bearing' premise for both sides.

Explicit-conversion error-rate study: does mandating explicit conversion ops at every representation change produce more wrong-target semantic errors than a checker-proven identity-subsumption sliver with elaboration records (decides whether the defender's conceded sliver is ever re-admitted).

Adversarially verify the load-bearing direct-extraction cards this ruling leans on (D001, D009, D010, C004, J004, A001, A002, A006) per the round1-index standing note, before any regime decision is finalized.

result.optimizerRole: For the optimizer the feature-as-charged is a documented net negative, and this part is decided on carded evidence, not the null hypothesis alone. Every carded appearance of a compilation/linkage boundary in this corpus is a pathology or its expensive cure: D004 (more codegen units inhibit optimization; LTO buys back whole-program visibility at longer link time), D007 (LTO/IPA/devirtualization are conditional, option-dependent, revertible, and cost compile time/memory/code size), D008 (interposition — an ABI stability semantics — blocks IPA, inlining, and propagation even for statically known code). The confirmed payoff facts (F001/F002 non-interference, F003/F004 noalias, F009's keep-facts-visible anchor) are exactly what a frozen internal ABI would attenuate at every module edge, and the ir-strategy verdict independently names every added boundary "a fact-loss and miscompile surface." The defender CONCEDED stable internal ABI, interposition, and separately-optimized codegen units, so release-mode whole-program closed-world optimization is uncontested. Two honesty caveats bind this role: (1) closed-world visibility makes devirtualization/specialization POSSIBLE, not guaranteed — the dispatch critic showed no card backs "guaranteed devirtualization," inliner heuristics remain heuristics, and D009-class function-typed values hide call targets inside fully closed programs; (2) the corpus has zero ABI/linking primary sources (ffi_abi_runtime backlog, priority-high), so the absence of pro-ABI evidence is selection-shaped — the cut rests on the carded boundary pathologies plus the standing rule, and the missing ABI research must still be done because the FFI wall inherits all of it.
result.verificationRole: Verification is where the real contest was, and the ruling splits it. The prosecutor is right that separate compilation converts globally checkable facts into trusted interface summaries: F003 facts are UB-bearing promises "only sound if frontend obligations are true," and a stale summary (module A compiled against yesterday's declaration of B) is a silent miscompile channel of exactly the unchecked-invariant class this language exists to eliminate. A closed world makes version skew impossible rather than detected — a genuine verification win in principle (mechanism follows from F003's soundness conditions; incident-level evidence like Rust's noalias miscompile history remains uncarded). But the defender's strongest point survives the cut and becomes a REQUIREMENT on the alternative: the writer is fallible at scale, so there must be a declared, redundant, independently checkable second statement of intent, or a coherently-hallucinated caller/callee pair regenerated together type-checks and ships. Crucially, that second statement does not need to live at module granularity: the aliasing-model design candidate (checked ownership in the type system) and F006 (SPARK: facts true by construction via a checking toolchain enforcing DECLARED restrictions on subprograms) put the declared-contract locus at the function signature, re-checked against bodies on every build. The defender's own residue confirms this reduction — their "separate semantic compilation" with compiler-version-internal IR and exact semantic fingerprints is an implementation of incremental checking inside a closed world, and their interface-edit-laundering risk applies identically to any declared-contract scheme. So: no module interfaces, but function-level contract-bearing signatures carrying the fact vocabulary are non-optional, and fact-boundary declarations (FFI, unsafe, reflection restriction per D005/D008 negative scopes) must exist as core constructs even with modules gone.
result.aiWriterConsiderations: All claims in this section are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence; both parties correctly flagged this. Admissible machine-writer costs, as ruled: (1) Compile latency in the iteration loop is the alternative's single largest real cost and it is currently unpriced — D004/D007/D001/D009 establish direction (whole-program IPA plus guaranteed-specialization compilation is the expensive regime) but never magnitude (caveats.md: documentation evidence never quantifies compile time). The mitigation (deterministic compiler, content-addressed function-level memoization and dev-mode codegen inside the closed world) is an implementation strategy with no card and no prototype; D004 supports that codegen units are build artifacts, not semantics, so incrementality can be implementation-level. (2) Token/context: module interfaces double as enforced compression for a token-bounded writer; the replacement is compiler-GENERATED interface views with no semantic weight — plausible, unmeasured in both directions. (3) Consistency drift cuts both ways: interface/implementation duplication is itself a drift surface (two copies of every signature), while whole-program regeneration without any second statement permits coherent-pair hallucination with unbounded blast radius; function-level checked contracts are the ruled middle, and contract-laundering (writer edits the declaration to match a wrong body) persists under ANY scheme and needs a gated-edit toolchain policy the language does not get for free. (4) Diagnostics: closed-world global checking surfaces errors far from causes; machine-readable diagnostics must carry cross-file provenance chains to stay actionable for automated repair — the ir-strategy verdict notes the diagnostics advantage claimed for language-level IRs has no supporting card.
whatMustBeTrue: The closed world, no-interposition, and finality are stated as explicit declared language invariants, not left as the absence of a module system — D008's negative scope says the language 'must separately choose module/ABI/interposition rules', and the dispatch verdict already carries these as amendments; the alternative's 'explicit FFI boundary' is module machinery by another name and must be specified as such.

The core/periphery fact-attenuation mechanism at the FFI wall is designed and carded BEFORE the closed-world commitment hardens — the dispatch verdict rules this 'a soundness precondition, not an optimization detail', and the ffi_abi_runtime backlog (missing_primary_source, priority-high) must be discharged since the single FFI boundary now carries all boundary load with no internal-module fallback.

Function-level declared, compiler-checked contracts carrying the fact vocabulary (ownership, effects, aliasing obligations per F001/F003/F006 and the aliasing-model design candidate) exist and are re-verified against bodies on every build — this is the redundant second statement of intent that replaces module interfaces as the drift check against coherently-hallucinated regeneration.
Runtime reflection/metadata is restricted per D005's negative scope, via an explicit per-construct capability declaration, so closed-world assumptions are not silently broken.

Incremental re-checking and dev-mode codegen use exact semantic fingerprints (content-addressed); any weaker cache key (timestamps, names) silently reuses stale discharge of F003/F004 obligations and is a miscompile vector, not an ergonomics bug.

Whole-program compile time and peak memory at realistic AI-generated program scales are measured and acceptable for the iteration loop; if unoptimized incremental dev builds do not suffice (e.g., the loop needs release-quality performance feedback), this verdict must be reopened.
Machine-readable diagnostics carry cross-file provenance chains sufficient for automated repair of nonlocal closed-world errors (ownership/aliasing violations surfacing far from their cause).
The compiler can generate token-compact interface VIEWS of any code region on demand (a tooling artifact with zero semantic weight) as the writer-context substitute for module interfaces.

This verdict is decided jointly with dispatch-generics: if the F009-gestured Swift-style fourth model (separately-compiled generics, witness tables, resilience domains) is later adopted, its entire rationale is a stable ABI and directly contradicts this cut; the coupling must be recorded in the decision log.
Contract edits are a gated, privileged operation in the write toolchain so a writer cannot launder body drift through the checker by rewriting the declaration to match a hallucinated implementation.
result.rationale: The feature as charged is a three-part bundle, and its defining parts fell without contest: the defender formally conceded stable internal ABI, symbol interposition, and separately-optimized codegen units, and the concession is compelled by the corpus — D008 documents ABI-stability semantics blocking IPA/inlining, D004 documents unit boundaries inhibiting optimization with LTO as expensive buy-back, D007 prices the recovery machinery as conditional and revertible, and not one card supports a stable internal ABI (the ffi_abi_runtime area is missing_primary_source, blocking even design-candidate status under caveats.md's standing rule). The null hypothesis therefore holds and keep_essential is off the table. The verdict is replace_with_alternative rather than a clean cut_from_core because the named alternative is not the null — it is a design with obligations the corpus itself identifies: the closed world is a declared module-semantics invariant (D008 negative scope; dispatch verdict amendment), the FFI wall's fact-attenuation is an undesigned soundness PRECONDITION (dispatch follow-up, verbatim), reflection must be restricted (D005), and the verification-first premise demands a replacement for the interface-as-second-statement function — ruled here to be function-level contract-bearing signatures (F006/SPARK precedent, aliasing-model candidate) re-checked from bodies every build, which captures the defender's genuine verification insight without resurrecting compilation-unit semantics. The defender's remaining position reduces, on inspection, to implementation-level incrementality (semantic-fingerprint caching, dev-mode codegen) plus declaration surfaces for fact boundaries — both preserved as requirements, neither needing separate compilation or an ABI. I decline needs_evidence: the cut of the defining components hinges on carded evidence and concession, not on untested AI-writer claims; what is untested is the COST side of the alternative (compile latency, token economics, drift rates, diagnostic repairability — all flagged EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED), and that risk is properly carried as named preconditions and experiments rather than by keeping an unsupported feature in the core. Honest bookkeeping: the corpus is aliasing-heavy by selection and contains no ABI/linking primary sources, so part of this ruling rests on selection-shaped absence; the reopen triggers are recorded (Swift-style generics ABI adoption, concurrency-model verdicts requiring dynamic loading, iteration-loop compile-cost measurements failing).
followUps: Discharge the ffi_abi_runtime backlog item (priority-high): collect and card primary sources on ABI, unwinding boundaries, LTO, GC statepoints, and C/C++/Rust/Fortran interop, then design the core/periphery fact-attenuation mechanism for the single FFI wall — the dispatch verdict's named soundness precondition for any closed-world commitment.

Prototype and price the alternative's unpriced cost: a deterministic closed-world compiler with content-addressed, semantic-fingerprint, function-level memoized checking and dev-mode codegen; measure iteration latency and peak memory against single-shot whole-program builds at synthetic AI-scale program sizes (AI code is plausibly larger and more repetitive than human code per the design premise). Pre-commit reopen thresholds.

Run the AI-writer experiments both parties flagged EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED: (a) rate at which function-level declared contracts catch coherently-hallucinated caller/callee regeneration pairs vs module interfaces vs no second statement; (b) token economics of compiler-generated interface views vs maintained semantic interfaces; (c) machine-repairability of nonlocal closed-world diagnostics with provenance chains vs boundary-anchored module errors; (d) whether contract-edit gating actually prevents laundering.

Card Rust's noalias enable/disable/miscompile history (already an ir-strategy gap): it is the closest real-world incident evidence for the version-skew/trusted-summary miscompile class this verdict claims the closed world eliminates.

Record the dispatch-generics coupling in the decision log and decide jointly: adoption of the F009-implied Swift-style fourth model (witness tables, resilience domains, separately-compiled generics) would contradict this cut; the Swift generics ABI dossier (backlog item, dispatch follow-up) must be built before either verdict hardens.

Revisit this verdict when the concurrency-model topic (research_needed) resolves: a verdict requiring runtime-loaded components (foreign threads, accelerator runtimes per the interop dossier) would force dynamic loading back through the FFI wall or reopen the closed-world commitment.

Specify the contract-edit gating policy and the fact-boundary declaration constructs (unsafe regions, FFI extern regions, reflection capability grants) as core-language surface, since with modules cut these declarations need a home — this is also the ir-strategy follow-up's fact-boundary/escape-hatch artifact, needed under any outcome.

result.optimizerRole: No carded pass consumes "T implements I" as an optimization fact: what backends attestedly eat is concrete-code facts — alias/non-interference (F001, F002, F003), reductions/inductions/FP-flags/loop-shape (A002, A005, A010), purity/effects (F006). The prosecution wins this sub-point cleanly. Interfaces' optimizer role is therefore indirect on both paths: the static path elaborates to exactly the concrete monomorphized functions a writer could emit directly (D001), and the dynamic path is a carded defeat (D002 vtable/no-inlining) with only conditional, revertible, option-dependent recovery (D007, D008); Julia evidence makes concreteness, not declared abstraction, the performance-bearing property (D009, D010). The real optimizer stakes are option-shaped, not conformance-shaped: a generic body present in the artifact is the prerequisite for compiler-side instantiation dedup, D005-style bounded sharing, and the F009/Swift-SIL model of optimizer-decided specialization — levers writer-side concretization forecloses permanently — and a language-known explicit dispatch construct prevents hand-rolled fn-pointer erasure, the D009 call-target-hiding defeat that round1-dispatch (A1 weakness #4) explicitly predicts when no sanctioned path exists. C004-class capability predicates (Send/Sync) let the optimizer treat non-atomic memory as unshared. Net: conformance-as-fact has zero attested optimizer value; implicit dynamic dispatch is net-negative and no one defends it; artifact-level generic structure has real but unmeasured option value on an axis round1 ruled empirically unarbitrable.
result.verificationRole: The strongest surviving argument in the trial is verificational and favors some grouping construct. Law annotations are UB-bearing optimizer contracts (F003; N002 "contracts, not mere annotations"; misleading-comparisons note 5), sound only if writer obligations are true (F001 negative scope). Writer-side concretization multiplies the independently-trusted assertion surface by the duplication factor and makes the invariant "these N functions implement one contract" inexpressible — post-hoc equivalence of drifted copies is undecidable. A contract group restores checkability (one contract site, one checked conformance per member); bounds additionally convert algorithm preconditions into compiler-checked obligations; a single generic body makes cross-copy body identity true by construction. Three caps: (a) the defense concedes the generic-body advantage over group-checked copies is site count plus by-construction identity, not a difference in kind — an impl can drift from its contract exactly as a copy can drift from its annotation; (b) the argument's weight scales with the unresolved checked-vs-trusted status of law annotations (no purity-check evidence exists; round1 cross-topic gap), and neither side has prototype evidence that laws on concrete functions survive lowering and are consumed end-to-end; (c) trait machinery adds verifier obligations (coherence, bound solving, D003 dyn-compatibility) that discharge no optimizer-consumed fact. Critically, the prosecution's own consistencyRisks concede provenance-grouped, compiler-checked cross-copy obligations — which is the contract-group half of interfaces reconstructed under another name. Both rulings therefore need the contract-grouping kernel; only the generic-body increment is genuinely contested.
result.aiWriterConsiderations: Every writer-behavior claim on both sides is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence. Admissible costs cut both ways. Cutting: O(N·K) source tokens per algorithm family, N-site change fan-out per edit inside the iteration loop, context inflation and stale-copy retrieval risk from near-duplicates, and the canonical drift substrate where a silently divergent regenerated copy plus a stale law annotation becomes an F003/N002-class miscompile channel. Keeping: a trait-resolution/coherence stage in every compile (unquantified; D001/D004 negative scopes), a hallucination surface in bounds/coherence/dyn-compatibility rules (D003) that discharge no optimizer fact, and non-local solver diagnostics (uncarded — no diagnostics evidence exists in the corpus at all). Neither magnitude is measured; the prosecution's deterministic-expander mitigation is undesigned, and the defense's claim that definition-site bound diagnostics shorten AI repair loops is asserted structurally, untested behaviorally. Citation-grade corrections found on review: C004 is a provisional direct extraction (feature-evidence-coverage.csv concurrency row: direct_source_extracted_needs_adversarial_verification), not workflow-confirmed 3-0 as the defense stated; and F004 attaches noalias-return per function — tying it to a Clone/Allocator-style interface contract is uncarded inference. The prosecution's reversibility claim is also only half-true: sugar can be added later, but writer-side concretization erases family identity from the artifact and forecloses the D005/F009 levers, so both directions carry irreversibility.
whatMustBeTrue: Law/effect annotations must be compiler-checked (proof obligations or verified properties), not merely trusted: if trusted, both the N-copy alternative and per-impl trait laws are drift channels into F003/N002-class UB, and both sides' verification cases reduce to site-count arithmetic on unchecked assertions (misleading-comparisons note 5).

Under any cut, the language must still provide the interface-shaped kernel both cases converge on: named contract groups (signature + law bundles) with compiler-checked per-member conformance and cross-copy annotation consistency; type-level capability predicates (C004-class, required by the round1 concurrency leading candidate); and an explicit closed-world dispatch construct (sum types + exhaustive match) — otherwise D009-style hand-rolled erasure and unchecked cross-copy drift follow. The prosecution's own risk list concedes this machinery, and it is currently undesigned.

Under any keep, the kept core must be restricted to decidable, coherent, non-overlapping resolution with guaranteed static specialization as the only implicit path and dynamic dispatch only via the explicit D003-style restricted construct — matching, not reopening, the round1-dispatch leading candidate; open-world implicit dyn is out under every position heard.

This feature ruling must not silently decide the monomorphization-vs-shared-body axis in either direction: round1-dispatch explicitly held it open pending measurement (zero quantitative cards on runtime, code size, i-cache, compile time), and writer-side full concretization is that axis decided in extremis.

AI drift rates across regenerated near-duplicate copies versus error rates writing bounds/impls must be measured before writer-side concretization is relied on at scale — the load-bearing behavioral claims of both cases are currently unmeasured (zero AI-codegen evidence in corpus).

The load-bearing dispatch cards (D001, D002, D003, D005, D007) must survive adversarial verification per the caveats.md standing rule before any final ruling hardens; feature-evidence-coverage.csv rates both dispatch rows low_to_medium confidence.
result.rationale: The trial decomposes cleanly, and the evidence decides the edges but not the pivot. Decided for the prosecution: interface conformance has zero attested optimizer value (no card shows any pass consuming an implements-fact; A005/F001-F003/A002/A010 all attach to concrete code), the dynamic path is a carded defeat with only conditional recovery (D002, D007, D008), and the trait rule-surface (D003 dyn-compatibility, coherence, bound solving) is verifier burden that discharges no optimizer-consumed fact. Decided for the defense: the named alternative as stated cannot carry the load — annotations on concrete functions only cannot express C004-class per-type capability predicates the round1 concurrency candidate requires, cannot state the cross-copy invariant whose absence turns regeneration drift into F003/N002-class miscompilation, and leaves the round1-dispatch candidate's explicit dyn construct without a domain; the prosecution itself concedes provenance-grouped compiler-checked cross-copy obligations, which reconstructs the contract-group half of interfaces under another name. Hence plain cut_from_core fails (the alternative does not carry the load as named) and keep_essential fails (necessity unproven: the optimizer case for keeping is option-preservation, not attested consumption; the verification case — the strongest single argument heard — hinges on the unresolved checked-vs-trusted status of law annotations, concedes site-count-not-kind, and partly rests on a mis-graded citation, C004 being provisional rather than workflow-confirmed). The genuinely contested residue is narrow: bounded quantification — whether a single generic body with guaranteed specialization lives in the core, or writers concretize into checked contract groups. That pivot is exactly the axis round1-dispatch ruled empirically unarbitrable (zero quantitative cards; the F009 fourth model unexamined; the F003-discharge constructive check never run), now compounded by AI-writer unknowns on which the corpus has zero evidence (drift rates, token magnitudes, repair-loop dynamics). Reversibility does not break the tie: sugar can be added later, but concretization erases family identity from the artifact and permanently forecloses the D005/F009 levers. Under the caveats.md standing rule and the corpus null-hypothesis discipline, ruling the pivot today would be a values commitment dressed as an evidence-driven one. Verdict: needs_evidence — with the decided sub-parts binding as recorded constraints (no implicit dynamic dispatch in core under any outcome; contract-group kernel, capability predicates, and explicit closed-world dispatch required under any outcome) and the deciding experiments named in followUps.
followUps: Run the corpus's first AI-codegen experiment, which directly arbitrates the pivot: generate the same algorithm family three ways — (a) bounded generic + per-type impls, (b) N concrete copies inside a checked contract group, (c) N unguarded concrete copies — across repeated regeneration/edit cycles; measure semantic drift rate, law-annotation desynchronization, source-token and context cost, compile-loop latency, and repair iterations from diagnostics; card the results.

Execute the round1-named constructive check: determine against LLVM semantics whether a shared/erased generic body can soundly discharge F003 noalias/alias.scope obligations, and at what precision loss versus per-instantiation code; record as an evidence card (this arbitrates whether guaranteed specialization must be the only path).

Run the round1 measurement program with pre-committed decision thresholds: monomorphization vs shared-body vs dictionary-passing on runtime, code size, i-cache behavior, and compile time, including rustc share-generics/instantiation-dedup data to bound mono-only code-size risk.

Resolve the checked-vs-trusted status of law annotations: prototype whether associative/pure/non-interfering annotations can carry proof obligations or property-test harnesses that survive lowering and are consumed by passes end-to-end (round1 cross-topic gap) — the weight of both sides' verification arguments scales directly with this.

Design-spike the common kernel now, safe under any verdict: a named contract-group construct (signature + law bundle, per-member conformance checking, provenance metadata) with no generic bodies and no dispatch; check whether it plus sum-type/exhaustive-match dispatch suffices to define the domain of the D003-style explicit dyn construct without full trait machinery.

Adversarially verify D001, D002, D003, D005, D007 per the caveats.md standing rule before the next hearing on this feature; both dispatch rows in feature-evidence-coverage.csv sit at low_to_medium confidence.

File the coupling record: any final ruling here amends round1 dispatch-generics (dyn construct domain, guaranteed-specialization surface) and concurrency-model (C004 capability predicates) verdicts, and must be entered as a coupled amendment, not an independent decision; also correct the record that C004 is provisional, not workflow-confirmed.

result.optimizerRole: Unwinding contributes zero confirmed optimizer benefit in this corpus and carries the corpus's only confirmed EH card as a cost: F008 (3-0, generalization LOW) shows representation choice constrains optimization — funclets forbid register allocation for values live into/out of them, and landingpad is only better *relative to funclets*. Both classic performance stories are unavailable: 'zero-cost EH keeps machinery off the normal path' was refuted 0-3 (refuted-and-unverified.jsonl rows 1-2, needs_manual_recheck), and 'exceptions are always slow' is a flagged misleading comparison (#4) — so neither side may argue from speed; the null wins on burden. Structurally (flagged as uncarded extension by the prosecution itself), unwind edges add implicit CFG edges and mid-function memory-observation points at every may-throw call, taxing exactly the F002-class payoffs (register promotion, dead-store elimination, reordering) the aliasing-heavy corpus exists to unlock. The replacement keeps error semantics as visible, branch-based dataflow: Result<T,E> monomorphizes to concrete discriminated values under the dispatch-generics leading candidate (D001), matching the F009/SIL lesson that performance-critical semantics be visible IR structure; A005 shows the corpus's only carded runtime-recovery mechanism (checks + versioning) is branch-based and needs no unwinder; N003 prices the guard barrier that both designs pay identically, confining the dispute to unwinding's marginal CFG/regalloc cost — which no card exonerates.
result.verificationRole: Verification is where the cut bites hardest in the feature's disfavor: exception safety is the worst invariant class for a fallible machine writer — implicit, cross-cutting, compiler-unchecked, exercised only on rare paths — while Result propagation is type-checked at every call site, so drift is caught mechanically. Drop-during-unwind synthesizes cleanup CFGs the writer never wrote or re-reads, enlarging the N006-style Alive2 validation surface of the verifier-checked IR candidate (structural claim, not measured). But the defender's verification counter-case identifies real obligations the bare alternative does not meet: (1) trap-with-report — the ONLY carded post-violation observability story (C002 Go halts; round1-violation-semantics names it explicitly) — requires stack attribution, so the alternative's wording 'no unwinding machinery anywhere' over-cuts: descriptive stack-walk metadata (CFI tables or frame pointers) must be carved out of the cut, as it powers diagnostics and the static-vs-profile candidate's offline profile channel without importing F008-class codegen constraints (this metadata-vs-execution distinction is load-bearing and itself uncarded). (2) Under trap=abort, the verification loop gets one diagnostic per process death and failure-path external-state cleanup becomes unexercisable — real costs, but of untested magnitude, and they are toolchain/harness questions (multi-process isolation, checked-tier design in the still-open violation-semantics debate), not grounds for core-language unwinding semantics. (3) 'Cleanup always runs' is explicitly NOT a language invariant under this verdict; no design doc may assume it.
result.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus has zero AI-codegen evidence. The prosecution's decisive writer argument is directionally sound: unwind-safety invariants fail silently across near-duplicate edits (no local diagnostic when a throw-only path breaks), whereas Result drift is caught at each type-checked call site; and with unwinding, a function's true CFG is absent from its token stream, raising re-read/edit cost. The defender's best writer argument survives and must be answered by the replacement's requirements, not dismissed: Result-only error *context* (cause, location, chain) hand-built per propagation site is a canonical silent-drift class because context-dropping variants type-check, while panic backtraces are runtime-generated at zero token cost. The remedy adopted here is to make error context by-construction in the language: auto-derived propagation context/cause chains (zero hand-written tokens per site) plus verifier-enforced propagation rules, restoring the zero-drift property without unwinding. Conceded and admissible: Result plumbing inflates tokens and creates propagation boilerplate to generate and re-read; a two-channel taxonomy (Result for expected errors, trap for contract violations) risks inconsistent classification across modules without a language-enforced rule; hot-path pressure risks in-band sentinel encoding without anti-sentinel lints. Whether these token/drift costs outweigh the verifiability gain is untestable from this corpus.
whatMustBeTrue: Result<T,E> lowers to concrete branch-based code under guaranteed static specialization (D001) with every propagation site verifier-checked; no hidden runtime machinery reappears in the lowering.

Trap-with-report + abort is a sufficient machine-readable diagnostics channel for an automated writer (C002 is the only adjacent precedent; round1-violation-semantics lists post-deployment observability as an open gap).

Descriptive stack-attribution metadata (CFI tables or frame pointers) can be emitted for trap reports and offline profiling WITHOUT reimporting F008-class codegen constraints — i.e., the metadata/execution-machinery distinction holds at implementation time (currently uncarded).

A multi-process test/fuzz harness keeps AI iteration-loop wall-clock acceptable despite one-diagnostic-per-execution and loss of warm in-process state (EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED; the defender's strongest cost claim).
AI writers maintain explicit Result plumbing more reliably than implicit exception-safety invariants, and auto-derived error context eliminates the per-site context-drift class (EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED).

Foreign unwinds (C++ exceptions, Rust panic=unwind) can be reliably firewalled with an abort-at-boundary rule at FFI edges (evidence-free both directions; ffi_abi_runtime backlog card is missing_primary_source, priority high).

The violation-semantics checked tier (graduated obligations, still research_needed) can be designed around trap=abort semantics, or its round-2 outcome does not require in-process trap containment as core-language semantics.
A language-enforced Result-vs-trap classification rule plus anti-sentinel lints prevent error-channel drift across modules (rule design uncarded).
'Cleanup always runs' is accepted as a non-invariant: external-resource cleanup after aborts falls to the OS or explicit design patterns, and no other design document silently assumes otherwise.
result.rationale: The null hypothesis is exclusion and the corpus cannot pay inclusion's burden: the only confirmed EH card (F008, 3-0 but generalization LOW) is cost-side; both exculpatory performance claims sit refuted 0-3 in refuted-and-unverified.jsonl with caveats.md ordering them preserved against reintroduction; misleading-comparisons #4 simultaneously bars the prosecution's speed rhetoric — so the case correctly reduces to burden-of-proof plus verification economics, and there the feature loses. Decisively, the defender CONCEDES catchable source-level exceptions, so the actual dispute is not the feature on trial but three residues of the alternative's over-broad wording. I rule on each. (1) Stack-walk metadata: the defender is right that 'no unwinding machinery anywhere' over-cuts — machine-readable trap reports (the brief's own admissible requirement, C002 the only carded precedent, named by the round1-violation-semantics verdict) and the static-vs-profile candidate's offline profile channel need stack attribution. But CFI tables are descriptive metadata, not unwinding execution (no personality functions, no cleanup execution, no funclet/landingpad lowering carrying F008 costs); carving them out amends the alternative rather than keeping the feature. (2) Checked-build unwinding for test-harness containment: this hinges entirely on EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED loop-economics claims, is coupled to a debate the corpus itself marks research_needed with uncarded checked-tier mechanics, and imports the dual-mode divergence risk the defender honestly names as its own strongest standing objection. It is a toolchain-implementation question, not core-language semantics; the core defines trap=abort with universal nounwind, and the harness question goes to the research track. Cutting core semantics now does not pre-decide it, provided the follow-up experiments are actually run. (3) FFI: the backlog gates this area from design_candidate status, and the gate cuts both ways — so the verdict ships with a provisional abort-at-boundary rule explicitly flagged evidence-free pending the ffi_abi_runtime card. The verdict is replace_with_alternative rather than cut_from_core because the bare alternative does not carry the load without named language requirements: verified Result propagation riding D001 monomorphization; trap-with-report with stack-attribution metadata; auto-derived error context to neutralize the defender's context-drift argument (the strongest surviving pro-unwinding point); a language-enforced Result-vs-trap classification rule; anti-sentinel lints; a declared process-isolation doctrine to prevent catch/recover bolt-ons; and the explicit invariant downgrade that cleanup does not run on abort. It is not needs_evidence because no untested claim, resolved either way, would put catchable exceptions or drop-during-unwind back in the core of a language whose corpus shows confirmed costs, refuted exculpations, and zero benefit cards — the untested claims shape the alternative's obligations and the toolchain, and are named as follow-ups.
followUps: Manual recheck of the two refuted LLVM EH claims folded into a three-way benchmark: Result-return vs landingpad-style unwinding vs trap=abort on representative kernels, measuring hot-path speed, code size, compile time, and binary size (unwind tables vs discriminant branches) — the single most decision-capable missing artifact for this topic.

Produce the ffi_abi_runtime primary-source card (unwinding boundaries, ABI) and design/cost the abort-at-boundary shim for foreign unwinds crossing native frames; until then the FFI rule in this verdict is provisional.

Card the stack-attribution options: unwind-table/CFI emission vs universal frame pointers — codegen cost, object size, and whether CFI emission is truly free of F008-class constraints; also confirm the (currently uncarded) claim that sample-based offline profiling requires one of them.

Run the controlled AI-codegen study the brief anticipates: (a) drift rates in hand-written vs auto-derived Result context (type-correct context loss), (b) violation rates of implicit exception-safety invariants under near-duplicate edits, (c) consistency of a two-channel Result-vs-trap taxonomy across a large generated codebase.

Measure in-process trap containment vs multi-process respawn wall-clock per detected defect in a trap-heavy AI test/fuzz loop; if containment wins decisively, revisit ONLY the toolchain-internal checked-tier mechanism (never source-level catch) in the violation-semantics round 2.

Constrain violation-semantics round 2 with trap=abort as the release-mode failure semantics and require it to specify checked-tier diagnostics under abort, plus what a trap means under racing threads (concurrency-model coupling, C001/C002 undecided).

Specify and prototype the verifier/lint layer this verdict makes mandatory: auto-derived cause-chain propagation, anti-sentinel (in-band error encoding) detection, and the language-enforced Result-vs-trap classification rule; validate that these closes the consistency-drift surface across repeated propagation code.

result.optimizerRole: The lifetime regime's job for the optimizer is fact supply. Every carded optimizer enabler in this space is a static, checked non-interference/lifetime contract: F001/C004 (ownership/exclusivity, the corpus's only adversarially-verified statically-discharged non-interference and data-race-freedom mechanisms), F002 (the payoff classes — register promotion, read/write elimination, reordering — flow from proven non-modification), F004 (the strongest allocation contract, fresh-return noalias, is emittable only given lifetime/provenance/escape rules), F006 (checked ownership ships in SPARK), A008 (visible consumption-of-storage buys copy-avoidance in Futhark). Automatic MM supplies zero carded facts and substitutes conditional runtime recovery: F007/J004 (escape analysis eliminates allocations conditionally, explicitly never guaranteed stack allocation; design_generalization_confidence low), J005 (warmup/code-cache costs of profile-driven recovery), C003 (every possibly-shared object forfeits register caching, reordering, write elision). F009 cuts both ways and I credit both readings: it proves that even flagship ARC must UN-hide retain/release as explicit IR instructions with a dedicated optimizer subsystem (the feature imports a compiler subsystem whose job is removing its own costs — prosecution), AND it proves 'visible and checkable' does not entail 'writer-written' — reclamation ops can be compiler-placed, optimizer-visible IR that passes sink, batch, and elide (defense). Net: the optimizer needs checked lifetime contracts and compiler-owned, IR-explicit drop placement; it has no carded need for GC, ambient RC, or invisible drop.
result.verificationRole: Decisive, and it cuts against the feature as charged. Object lifetime is precisely the invariant class an at-scale-fallible writer cannot be trusted to keep unchecked, and N002 states the corpus-wide pattern: optimizer facts are contracts with verifier consequences, not mere annotations. Checked lifetime contracts convert use-after-free, double-free, and leak-past-contract into compile-time machine-readable rejections (F006 is the shipped existence proof); GC and invisible implicit drop mask writer lifetime errors (unintended retention, cycles, hot-loop allocation) into runtime profiling mysteries — no compile-time channel, and any noalias/lifetime metadata emitted over a collector violates memory-object-model.md's emission rule (no lifetime.start/end or noalias without a matching source contract; a collector provides none). However, the defense landed a real verification point the ruling must absorb: the checking power lives in the ownership machinery, not in the writer-written free per se. A checkable free is by construction recomputable by the checker; an uncheckable free is a banned trust point (F003: alias facts are UB-if-false; C004 negative scope), and the arena-plus-index workaround reintroduces use-after-free as well-typed slot-recycling bugs invisible to any checker. So 'every free visible and checkable' is satisfied at the contract-plus-IR level, and whether the source ALSO carries writer-written frees (prosecution's double-entry bookkeeping, which catches wrong lifetime INTENT — e.g., unintended retention surfacing as a compile error at the writer's stated drop point — versus pure drift surface) is a genuine open question the corpus cannot decide.
result.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence — but the structural ledger is: (1) Token/context cost favors the feature: pervasive region/ownership annotations and viral lifetime parameters through transitive signatures multiply generated and re-read tokens; partially marginal since the round1-aliasing leading candidate already puts ownership in signatures. (2) Diagnostics channel favors the alternative: checked contracts turn lifetime drift and pairing errors into compile-time machine-readable errors inside the iteration loop; GC/RC failure modes surface only at runtime, the worst channel for an AI writer. (3) Consistency drift cuts both ways: repeated alloc/free/region blocks are a drift surface, but the checker converts safety-relevant drift into rejections; equivalent-but-different annotation spellings degrade context caching unless the language enforces canonical forms. (4) Two verification blind spots survive under the alternative and must be closed by tooling: safe-but-pessimal region assignment (everything in one long-lived arena type-checks) and reclamation timeliness (allocating into a too-long-lived region is well-typed), so leak/quality diagnostics vanish from the machine channel unless lint-class feedback is added. (5) Long-range alloc/free pairing obligations and frontier restructurings are compile-iteration cost multipliers with unmeasured rates. None of these ledger entries is carded as decisive; the spelling-level questions are remanded to experiment below.
whatMustBeTrue: The round1-aliasing leading candidate (checked ownership/exclusive-mutation in the type system, currently design_candidate_later, NOT decided) lands substantially as described; both parties conceded their cases derive drop/lifetime facts from it, so if round 2 displaces ownership-like discharge, this verdict must be re-litigated.

memory-object-model.md's prerequisite questions (object identity, provenance, interior-pointer stability across moves, uninitialized bytes, unsafe/callback/signal/finalizer/FFI invalidation) are answered before any lifetime.start/end or noalias emission — per its own emission rule these block BOTH the feature and the alternative today.

The region/arena half of the alternative acquires exemplar evidence cards (Cyclone, MLKit region inference including its leak pathologies, Koka, DPJ) — the ownership half is carded (F001/F006/C004) but the region/effect verifier family currently has ZERO exemplar cards (round1-aliasing P3 assessment), so mandating it today would violate the standing rule exactly as keeping GC would.

The statically-unprovable-lifetime frontier (graphs, shared caches, detached tasks) measures SMALL in performance-critical generated code — round1-aliasing names frontier size the decisive unmeasured variable; if it measures large, the residue channel question (explicit restricted RC type under the dispatch-generics pattern vs arena restructuring vs localized unsafe) reopens as a first-class debate with new cards.

The language ships the amended-alternative requirements in the rationale: canonical annotation forms with compiler-enforced normalization (consistency-checking of repeated code), compiler-derived drop points surfaced as explicit IR ops and machine-readable per-function lifetime reports (F009 route, no invisible reclamation), lint-class timeliness/region-quality diagnostics, and a localized greppable escape-hatch policy whose density is measured.

AI-writer experiments (drift rates on regenerated annotated signatures, alloc/free pairing error rates, compile-diagnostic vs runtime-profiling loop efficacy) do not overturn the structural cost ledger — every behavioral claim in this ruling is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED.

No shared-mutable RC/interior-mutability type is admitted, even as a restricted channel, before the interior-mutability-vs-shared-reference-noalias tension (misleading-comparisons #2, flagged uncarded by round1-aliasing) is carded and resolved, and before the uncarded RC mechanism costs (barrier/refcount traffic, cycle leaks, C003 possibly-shared pricing) get cards.
result.rationale: RULING: Automatic memory management is cut from the core, and the explicit checked-lifetime alternative becomes a language requirement — in an amended form, with two sub-questions remanded for evidence. (1) What is decided: tracing GC as the ambient memory model, pervasive/default RC-ARC, and invisible implicit drop are OUT. The evidence asymmetry is decisive under the standing rule (caveats.md: proposals must cite exact cards): not one card in F/N/A/D/C/J attests that automatic MM enables optimization, while the alternative's ownership half is the corpus's best-attested machinery (F001, F002, F006, C004, A008, N002). The only cards touching managed-runtime memory attest conditional, implementation-and-inlining-dependent recovery that Oracle explicitly does not guarantee (F007, J004) with warmup/memory costs (J005) — and a charter of extreme performance with a fallible writer demands guarantees, not conditions (the prosecutor used misleading-comparisons #3's exact preferred wording; the defender conceded the point outright). F009 seals it: even the flagship ARC language had to de-automate MM inside its compiler to optimize it. The defense's own stance abandoned pervasive GC, so on the headline feature the parties converge and I so rule. (2) Why replace_with_alternative rather than cut_from_core: the alternative as literally named — 'every allocation and free writer-written' — is NOT fully carried by the evidence. The defense's dichotomy is sound: a checkable writer-written free is recomputable by the very ownership checker the language must build anyway (F001/F006 — pure redundancy whose value or drift-cost is unmeasured), and an uncheckable free is a banned trust point (F003 UB-if-false; C004 negative scope), whose practical workaround (arena-plus-index) resurrects use-after-free as well-typed logical bugs. Moreover the region/arena verifier family has zero exemplar cards (round1-aliasing evidence gap), so the alternative cannot simply be declared load-bearing as-is. The requirement is therefore amended: (a) every allocation carries a writer-stated, compiler-checked storage/lifetime contract (ownership/region type) — the N002 contract pattern; (b) every deallocation is visible and checkable at the contract and IR level — compiler-derived drop points surfaced as explicit IR operations (F009) and as machine-readable per-function lifetime reports, never invisible runtime effects (this also defuses the hidden-effectful-drop conflict with the unsettled violation-semantics/effects debates); (c) compiler-enforced canonical spelling of lifetime annotations plus checker-verified consistency between writer-stated contracts and derived drops, so near-duplicate code cannot drift into equivalent-but-different forms — the consistency-checking obligation this verdict imposes; (d) lint-class machine-readable diagnostics for region-assignment quality and reclamation timeliness, closing the two well-typed-but-wrong holes (one-big-arena pessimization, too-long-lived-region leaks) that neither advocate could card away. (3) What is remanded, not decided: whether source code additionally carries writer-written free/region-end statements (prosecution's double-entry bookkeeping — a writer-intent statement whose mismatch with the checker's derivation is itself a diagnostic — versus defense's pure-token-drift-surface) is empirically undecidable today; F009 evidences only IR-level explicitness and is N=1 with OSSA caveats. And whether the unprovable-lifetime residue gets an explicit restricted RC type (defense's analogy to the dispatch-generics crowned pattern — a real architectural precedent in round1-index — but priced by C003 and punctured by the uncarded interior-mutability tension) or is handled by arenas/localized-unsafe depends on the frontier size round1-aliasing names as the decisive unmeasured variable. Both remands carry named experiments in followUps; the RC channel is re-admissible only with new cards, per the prosecution's own re-admission clause. (4) Judicial notes on argument quality: the prosecutor's J002 extension from speculation-guard machinery to object lifetime is analogical, not carded, and was weighed as pattern-support only; the prosecutor was however scrupulous in refusing to lean on uncarded GC mechanism costs. The defender's honest concession on GC and its verification-architecture dichotomy were the strongest defense material; its 'timeliness becomes unverifiable under regions' point survives and is converted into requirement (d). This is not needs_evidence because the GC/ambient-RC cut and the checked-contract requirement are decidable now on evidence asymmetry; it is not keep_essential because nothing carded makes automatic MM necessary for either optimization or verification; it is not bare cut_from_core because the named alternative needs the amendments and evidence conditions above before it can carry the load it is being handed.
followUps: Run the decisive spelling experiment (AI-codegen, first of its kind for this corpus): generate the same workload suite under (a) writer-written free/region-end statements plus checker and (b) ownership-types-only with compiler-derived, machine-readably-surfaced drops; measure token volume, drift rate across near-duplicate regenerations, compile-iterations-to-green, and detection rate of injected lifetime-intent bugs (unintended retention, premature free). This resolves the remanded writer-written-free question.

Measure the frontier (adopts round1-aliasing follow-up): survey unsafe/Arc/arena-index density in performance-critical Rust code and SPARK ownership discharge rates to size the statically-unprovable-lifetime residue — the variable that decides the RC-fallback question.

Create adversarially-verified cards for the region/effect verifier family (Cyclone, MLKit region inference INCLUDING leak pathologies, Koka, DPJ): the alternative's region half is currently the uncarded mechanism family and this verdict is conditional on it.

Card the deliberately-unused GC/RC mechanism costs before any RC re-admission debate: write/read barriers, safepoint effects on optimization, retain/release cache-line traffic, RC cycle leaks, moving-collector interior-pointer effects — currently background knowledge on both sides' EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED lists.
Card the interior-mutability vs shared-reference-noalias tension (misleading-comparisons #2; round1-aliasing follow-up) — it gates any future shared-mutable fallback type.

Answer memory-object-model.md's prerequisite questions (identity, provenance, interior-pointer stability across moves, FFI/callback/finalizer invalidation) as a blocking work item; its emission rule blocks sound lifetime-fact emission for every design on the table.

Benchmark drop-placement freedom: compiler-sunk/batched/elided drops versus fixed writer-placed frees on realistic workloads, converting F009's in-kind ARC-optimization classes into in-magnitude evidence.

Specify the machine-readable diagnostics schema this verdict requires: lifetime contract violations (error class) plus region-quality and timeliness lints (warning class with locations), and validate that an AI writer can act on them in-loop (EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED).
Re-run this trial if the round2 aliasing debate displaces checked ownership as the discharge mechanism — both parties stipulated this dependency and the court agrees it is load-bearing.

minimalCoreSketch: SURFACE: exactly one canonical form — one spelling per semantic construct, one legal byte-level formatting, grammar isomorphic to the checked core tree; non-canonical input is a hard error, never auto-formatted; the stored artifact is fully elaborated (every type/mode/effect/contract explicit) and is the only stored spelling [syntax, type-inference].

COMPILATION MODEL: closed-world, whole-program, no stable internal ABI, no interposition, no separate semantic compilation; incrementality is implementation-level via content-addressed exact semantic fingerprints; exactly one explicit FFI wall with declared fact-attenuation (currently UNDESIGNED — a named soundness precondition, not a detail) [modules; D004/D007/D008].

TYPES AND FACTS: concrete static types everywhere at boundaries — every function signature, module-interface-equivalent, and instantiation carries explicit ownership/aliasing capability, effect row, numeric mode, and ABI-visible layout; zero cross-boundary inference; whether INTERIOR let-bindings are annotated or produced by deterministic, defaulting-free, ambiguity-rejecting local synthesis is the one open regime question (needs_evidence) [type-inference; F001/F003/N002/C004].

GENERICS: monomorphization-only parametric generics, compiler-side expansion always, explicit instantiation arguments (no inference/bound-solving in the trust path), templates type-checked once against declared bounds before instantiation, no polymorphic recursion or higher-rank parameters, no IR-level generic ABI or witness tables; per-type divergence only via explicit individually-checked specializations with coherence rules [generics; D001/D005/F009 axis held open].

NUMERICS: a small vocabulary of named, truthfully-lowered numeric modes, each arithmetic node naming exactly one mode; zero implicit value-changing conversions — every representation change is an explicit, named, mode-carrying operation [type-inference floor; N001/N002/D010].

DISPATCH: sum types with compiler-checked exhaustive match (wildcard arms banned in checked contexts) as the only dispatch mechanism in core; typed operation tables (named fields, per-row signature checks, construction-checked payload/table coupling, one canonical table per variant-set×operation) as the blessed data-driven form; NO dyn/vtables/trait objects in core — open-set dispatch is remanded to the FFI periphery [dynamic-dispatch; D001/D002/D009].

FUNCTION VALUES: explicit env structs passed as type parameters implementing a call interface, monomorphized to guaranteed direct calls; env-field types (owned/&/&mut) ARE the declared capture modes; no capture inference, no anonymous escaping environments; escaping/heterogeneous sets only via closed tag-enums (record-of-closures is the residual idiom, cost unmeasured) [closures; D009].

MEMORY: every allocation carries a writer-stated, compiler-checked storage/lifetime contract (ownership, with a to-be-carded region/arena layer); deallocation is compiler-derived but surfaced as explicit IR drop ops plus machine-readable per-function lifetime reports — no GC, no ambient RC, no invisible drop; 'cleanup always runs' is explicitly NOT an invariant [memory-automation, error-handling; F001/F006/C004/F009].

ERRORS: Result<T,E> monomorphized to concrete branch-based code with verifier-checked propagation and auto-derived context/cause chains, plus trap-with-report=abort for contract violations, with descriptive stack-attribution metadata (CFI/frame pointers) but no unwinding execution semantics, no catch, no drop-during-unwind [error-handling; F008/C002/A005].

COMPILE-TIME COMPUTATION: a closed, decidable, trivially-terminating constant-expression sublanguage (built-in arithmetic/layout/target-parameter constants only); no user-defined compile-time evaluation, no macros, no staging; facts about constant data are compiler-derived by inspection, never writer-asserted [metaprogramming; F006/N004].
